description: Indexing quality benchmark. Test videos covering diverse content types, with queries from search_benchmark.json that target these videos.

test_videos.description: PPT-heavy keynote about AI startup moats. Tests: slide detection, OCR, visual descriptions.
Aaron Levie interview about enterprise AI. Tests: talking head filter, rare visual moments.
Cursor for product managers. Tests: screen recording recognition, UI element analysis.
Robot dog footage. Tests: short video bias, visual-heavy content, dense annotation.
Reusable rockets startup. Tests: mixed content types (factory, rockets, interview), B-roll detection.
Reward hacking explainer. Tests: concept explanation segments, educational content retrieval.
Transformer architecture explained. Tests: technical diagrams, educational visual content.
ChatGPT shopping interface demo. Tests: UI screenshots, product demo recognition.
